name: accessimind-accessible-ui-agent
description: Evidence-backed WCAG 2.2 UI, Codex plugin UI, and agentic screen-reader audit workflows.

interface.shortDescription: WCAG audits, plugin UI gates, keyboard checks, NVDA evidence, and accessible UI implementation.
interface.longDescription: AccessiMind Accessible UI Agent helps Codex produce production-ready accessible web UI, Codex plugin UI accessibility gates, WCAG 2.2 reviews, evidence-backed HTML reports, keyboard and focus analysis, real screen-reader evidence, agentic NVDA navigation, and Jira-ready remediation tasks. Invoke the bundled skill with $accessimind.
defaultPrompt: Test this flow with a screen reader.
